Class PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractComparableVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractNumberVerifier<S,V,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>,PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<Float>,Float>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>,Float>, ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>,Float>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>,Float>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>,Float>, ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier<PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>,Float>, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>
public final class PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl extends AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>,PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<Float>,Float> implements PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<Float>
Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier for floats.
